_comment: Provider-agnostic ModelRouter config. No component or route ever names a model directly — all reasoning calls go through this chain. See blueprint Appendix A + E4/E5.

chain.notes: Deep reasoning, token-budget compilation, zero-trust security auditing. Confirm exact model string in Anthropic console.
Closest peer to Fable 5 — full deep-reasoning + security-audit parity. Preferred for security-critical fallback.
Fast, lower-cost. High-volume schema and scaffolding hardening only. Not permitted for security-critical tasks.
Cross-vendor escape hatch. Survives Anthropic-wide outage or daily-limit exhaustion. Requires separate xAI API key (NOT SuperGrok). Verify slug at docs.x.ai/developers/models.
Fallback within diversity tier. Strong agentic tool-calling, low hallucination rate. Verify slug at docs.x.ai/developers/models.

circuit_breaker._comment: E4 fix: state persisted in Upstash Redis (key: breaker:<model_id>), NOT module memory. Cold starts must not reset breaker state.

parity_guard._comment: E5 fix: sync judging in build loop only. At runtime: schema validation sync, LLM judge async+sampled. Failed async judge quarantines tier, does not block current request.

telemetry._comment: E6 fix: minimal M1 counters are a Phase 4 EXIT GATE. Must emit before Phase 4 closes.

security_policy.note: Tasks tagged security_critical MUST NOT run on Sonnet or Grok tiers. Availability pressure never silently lowers the security bar.
